## Summary

- 

## Accessibility checks

- [ ] Keyboard navigation checked for changed flows
- [ ] Visible focus states preserved
- [ ] Labels, hints, and errors checked for forms
- [ ] Screen reader-friendly names checked for interactive controls
- [ ] No meaning conveyed by color alone

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:a11y`

## Data sources

- [ ] New policy/support data includes `sourceUrl`, `sourceName`, `lastReviewed`, and `verificationStatus`
- [ ] Demo data is clearly marked as `sample`
